item.description: We watched A New Hope last night and it made me think of this one.
item.dc:creator: AsajjSeamstress

item.title: If you're having a bad day, here's an assortment wholesome dump to make you smile : )
item.description:
1. That's how you have fun
2. Chunky boyyy
3. Doggos acting like drunk buddies at a bar
4. Piggy getting combed
5. Bunny making its bunny bed
6. Them eyebrows
7
8
9. This game looks fun
10. Getting a shower
11. Cow zoomies
12. Horsie zoomies
13. Here we have a tree logging machine having breakfeast in its natural habitat
14. Otter having its temperature taken : )
15 Thank you if you made this far in the dump!Let me share with you that as well as posting on Imgur, I'm also working on a game of my own. A passion project, if you will. It's a "Stanley Parable" inspired first person narrative game. If you like the humor of this dump, you might actually like the game to (at least what my friend on Discord tells me, that one friend). Anyway please wishlist it helps small game devs like me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a great Saturday!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Images of Note: cheat codes probably
item.description:
I C E
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii We now have fake ads.
Don't....don't do this to me.
very small
10/10 good pants
I need an axe.
This dump was brought to you by Bricks.
Ahhh fuck. I can't believe you've done this.
Foolish Mortals is a good thing to say to be honest
SUMMER IS ICUMMEN IN
(It's a Bingocard
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also STREAM! http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii

item.title: Some Saturday Morning Memetoons
item.description:
I
Hope
Everyone
Reading
These
Has
A
Truly
Wonderful
Saturday.
It’s
Getting
Hot
In
Texas
These
Days.
Memes
Make
The
World
Go
‘Round.
I
Hope
In
100
Years
Memes
Will
Be
Considered
A
Love
Language.
GIFs
Too,
Honestly.
Be
Kind
To
Yourself! ?

item.title: The Void Dumps Back - Episode 29
item.description:
Hello all! Happy weekend to all who celebrate. Remember! You can click on a image, and at the top it will tell you the image number. Also, click on the comment bubble to comment on it, with the link already made for you! If you knew this already, awesome! If not, well now you know!  <3 (This doesn't work on the old site layout. Sorry)
To protect the world fr devastation...
MOTHMAN! MOTHMAN! MOTHMAN!
Kind of? Kind of a pre-Hobbit. If I remember correctly.
For real. And the second one, you'd just be staring at the lake. The unbroken surface of the lake.
Hope everyone has a good day! If this is not the case, I hope tomorrow is better.
item.dc:creator: DaBaDoop

item.dc:creator: Noonius

item.title: It will be a much better long term value.
item.description: Kids watch the same movies over and over again. With these three libraries I can escape 2 subscription fees and put my money somewhere that will have a longer lasting impact on his development. And ethically, I am over it. I'm done paying a subscription fee just so my kids can watch Totoru and Cars and Frozen over and over and over again. And when you do pay for the movie via cloud service, it can be taken away at any time because their contract with a studio changed. Any tips for streaming capture techniques for PC via DM would be very much appreciated.

item.title: Teach your kids to be safe on the internet.
item.description: They showed around a enlarged picture of the girls face because they found the school name on a book in the background after they found the "pictures" on certain internet sites. Resouces to teach your children how to be safe on the internet: https://edu.gcfglobal.org/en/internetsafetyforkids/teaching-kids-about-internet-safety/1/#
item.dc:creator: Sanotassard

item.title: Next level autograph, and the control on the movement though
item.dc:creator: SpecialIspSprkR

item.title: Rabbit is 14 this spring; his eyes are still bright and he’s a a good boy
item.description:
He was born without a tail! He inherited this trait from his mother, who was a Calico and who had a similar nub. He wiggles the nub when he’s excited.
Potato picture but he can be quite stoic and fluffed like an owl, so I wanted to keep it in.
He got a special warming pad this year after his best friend, Leo, died. He needed some warmth to snuggle to and the dog is not 100% into it, so we did our best. He didn’t like it at first, but now he’s on it quite a bit, especially in the morning. He’s changed a lot since he lost his partner. They lived side by side for over a decade. I don’t post much (mostly comments are my thing), but I do love this little man and sometimes I just want other people to see him and love him, too. Edit: first (and probably only) most viral post! It’s delightful and fitting that it should be Rabbit who is so popular; he has certainly always believed he is infinitely deserving of attention and affection. Who are we to argue? Thanks for the love - I’ll be sure to pass it along!
item.dc:creator: PainGwen
